Our services

ZendEase Delivery

Worldwide shipping,
made easy.

Whatever the size, wherever it's going — pick the lane that fits your shipment.

Express

Personal & Samples

Door-to-door · 3–5 days
  • Air courier — DHL & USPS partnered
  • Perfect for samples or small loads
  • Document compliance ensured
Business

High Value & Volume

Door-to-door · 45–90 days
  • Medium–large quantity (CBM, LCL, FCL)
  • End-to-end managed service
  • All documents handled for you
Local

End-to-End in the PH

Nationwide · door-to-door
  • Parcel to pallet, flexible volume
  • Last-mile & fulfillment

Instant quote

Know your rate in seconds

Rates are based on chargeable weight — the greater of your parcel's actual weight or its volumetric weight (L×W×H cm ÷ 5000). Get your exact, up-to-date quote straight from our official calculator.

Get an instant quote

Covers Metro Manila → recipient abroad (Delivered Duties Unpaid). Duties, taxes & surcharges may apply and will be confirmed by the ZendEase team.
